description:
The HyperlinkDisplayInterface component is spawned by the favorites system when a user pastes a link that is recognized as a website link rather than a specific media type. 

See Favorites on favoritable items like this one.

fields.ItemName: The name of this favoritable item.
fields.SpawningUser: The user that spawned this favoritable item.
fields.SpawningUserID: The field containing the ID of the user that spawned this favoritable item.
fields.IsInstance: Whether this item is an instance.
fields.Url: The field to fill with the URL this hyperlink display should leas to.
fields.UrlString: The field to fill with the URL as a string so the hyperlink display can show what it leads to.

usage: This component can be made part of a UI that can be modified and favorited to become the user's default hyperlink spawning UI.
